subject: Did you miss this?
body:
Hey, it's Alex.

I want to make sure everyone gets value ahead of the new book launch.

So in case you missed it, I recently released this new video below:

"How to get SO rich you question the meaning of making money"

It shows you how getting rich really works. In the past 4 days, it's started to be shared a bunch. People are saying it's one of their favorites.

Wanted to make sure you didn't miss it.

Let me know if you like it too.

Alex
